name: Crustless Crab Qiuche
recipeInstructions:
1. Defrost and slice the crab meat, reserving 2 tablespoons of crab meat liquid or use canned ham.
2. Fry bacon until crisp. Drain and crumble.
3. Beat together eggs, Bisquick, butter, milk, salt, pepper, and 2 tablespoons of crab meat liquid in a bowl until smooth.
4. Pour the mixture into a 9-inch pie plate.
5. Sprinkle shredded Swiss cheese and crumbled bacon evenly over the top.
6. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
